title: ホープフルSの後に・結果は上々！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket achieves excellent results, proving
her ability to handle a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide drop by to
congratulate her, leaving Winning Ticket deeply
moved by the friendship that the three share.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Yayoi Sho, where Winning
Ticket will face off against Narita Taishin.
